## What does this PR do?
A clear description of the change and why it's needed.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## How has this been tested?
Describe how you tested this on a real device with actual .lrc files and audio.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested on a real Android device with real .lrc and audio files
- [ ] Tested with non-Latin characters if lyrics are affected
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new dependencies that phone home or collect data
- [ ] Code follows the existing style
